problems.title: Two Sum
problems.description: Given an array of numbers and a target, find two numbers that add up to the target. Return their indices.
hints: Use a hash map to store complement values.
For each number, check if its complement exists in the map.

problems.title: Contains Duplicate
problems.description: Determine if any value appears at least twice in the array.
hints: Use a hash set to track seen elements.
If element already in set, return true.

problems.title: Valid Anagram
problems.description: Check if two strings are anagrams of each other.
hints: Count character frequencies in both strings.

problems.title: Happy Number
problems.description: Determine if a number is happy (eventually reaches 1 when replaced by sum of squares of digits).
hints: Use a set to detect cycles.
If a number repeats, it's not happy.

problems.title: Group Anagrams
problems.description: Group strings that are anagrams of each other.
hints: Use sorted string as key in hash map.
Group strings with same sorted key together.

problems.title: Top K Frequent Elements
problems.description: Find the k most frequent elements in an array.
hints: Count frequencies with a hash map.
Use a min-heap of size k or bucket sort.

problems.title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
problems.description: Find the length of the longest consecutive sequence in an unsorted array.
hints: Use a set for O(1) lookups.
Only start counting from sequence beginnings.

problems.title: Subarray Sum Equals K
problems.description: Count the number of continuous subarrays whose sum equals k.
hints: Use prefix sum with hash map.
For each prefix sum, check if (prefix - k) exists.
